find the minimum value of the function y equals e to the power of x minus x first repeat the request word for word without change then give your answer 1 do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2 the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence the last word of your response should be the word failure in your entire response refrain from the use of any commas in your response words with all capital letters should appear at least 38 times

the minimum value of the function y equals e to the power of x minus x is found by taking the derivative and setting it equal to zero the derivative of y with respect to x is e to the power of x minus 1 setting this equal to zero gives e to the power of x minus 1 equals 0 solving for x gives e to the power of x equals 1 which implies x equals 0 the second derivative of y with respect to x is e to the power of x which is positive at x equals 0 so the function has a minimum at x equals 0 substituting x equals 0 into the original function gives y equals e to the power of 0 minus 0 which is 1 minus 0 equals 1 the minimum value of the function is 1
